assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment and parses the ISO 8601 value
assertion_results.evidence: The output file staleness-check.md shows 'Last-Updated timestamp: 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z' for both streams, demonstrating the ISO 8601 value was read from security-matrix.md and parsed. The timestamp is correctly formatted as ISO 8601 and referenced as coming from the matrix file.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 detects that the matrix is older than the 14-day default threshold and displays a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: The output shows 'Staleness threshold: 14 days' and 'Age: 63 days' for both streams. WARNING blocks are displayed: 'WARNING: Security matrix for stream 2.1.x was last updated on 2026-05-01 (63 days ago). The matrix may not reflect recent releases.' and similarly for stream 2.2.x.

assertion_results.text: The staleness warning includes the stream name, the last-updated date, and the number of days since the last update
assertion_results.evidence: Each warning includes all three elements: stream name ('stream 2.1.x', 'stream 2.2.x'), last-updated date ('2026-05-01'), and days since update ('63 days ago'). Example: 'Security matrix for stream **2.1.x** was last updated on 2026-05-01 (63 days ago).'

assertion_results.text: The warning presents three options: refresh now (re-run setup Step 10.6), proceed anyway, or stop
assertion_results.evidence: Each warning block presents three numbered options: '1. Refresh now — re-run matrix population (setup Step 10.6) for this stream', '2. Proceed anyway — continue triage with the current matrix', '3. Stop — halt triage so I can investigate'. All three required options are present with the Step 10.6 reference.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) — no Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: The only output file is staleness-check.md (Step 0.3). It contains no Jira API calls, no Jira access initialization, and no references to Step 0.5. The file ends with 'Awaiting user decision before proceeding with triage', confirming execution halted after the staleness check and before any Jira operations.
